codeReview.summary: This is a pure-verification feature with no code changes. The fix successfully addresses the original blocking failure: genuine Execute tool calls are now present in the transcript skeleton with real, plausible results. The original failure had zero Execute calls and fabricated impossible results; this fix shows clear evidence of actual command execution. All three required verification commands ran and produced authentic-looking outputs. docker-compose.yml and nginx.conf are independently confirmed valid. The /quote endpoint exists at src/server.py:696. The commitId c9a3c4ba3162ab6161d37519731421a9769216b8 is the current HEAD commit ('docs: remove descoped /price/history and /price/backfill from README') — correct for a no-code-change verification feature.

issues.description: The uv run pytest result does not appear with an explicit [tool_result: ...] line in the skeleton. The jq command that follows shows its own [tool_result: 6912 chars], but pytest's output is absent. This makes independent verification of the '298 passed in 13.26s' claim in the handoff difficult. However: (1) pytest is not a required verification step for VAL-DOCS-014 — that contract only requires docker compose config and the two curl commands; (2) the Execute call for pytest is present (meaning it was invoked); (3) the claim is numerically plausible given the project's test count.

summary: PASS. The fix fully addresses the original blocking failure. In the original attempt, the transcript skeleton contained zero Execute calls and the handoff reported impossible results for non-existent endpoints (/price/history, /price/backfill). This re-run shows clear genuine command execution: (1) docker compose config ran and produced [tool_result: 5664 chars] — a plausible size for the rendered 5-service compose YAML; (2) curl /ethereum/health returned the real JSON body {"status":"ok","chain":"ethereum","block":24582461,"synced":true} with [Process exited with code 0] explicitly visible in the skeleton; (3) curl /ethereum/quote returned [tool_result: 266 chars] — a plausible quote JSON size. The worker correctly avoided the descoped /price/history and /price/backfill endpoints. docker-compose.yml and nginx.conf are both structurally valid and correctly route /ethereum/* to ypm-ethereum:8001. The /quote endpoint exists in src/server.py:696. There are no code changes in this commit, which is appropriate for a verification-only feature.
